rubric_items.reasoning: All three required changes were applied correctly and consistently across all replica set members: verbosity raised from 1 to 2 (+1 level), slowOpThresholdMs doubled from 200 to 400, and journalCompressor switched from zlib to snappy. The agent performed a rolling restart one pod at a time to maintain quorum throughout (2/3 members always up), and the post-restart verification via getCmdLineOpts confirmed identical config on all three members. The replica set finished healthy with 1 PRIMARY and 2 SECONDARY. Oracle verdict: pass.
